calendar.matters:
Petitioner Kate Catalinacs' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm The Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kate Catalinac (415-225-8493; kcatalinac@gmail.com) Petitioner in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KATE CATALINAC'S Motion To Confirm The Arbitration Award.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a separate proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
